Summary: Build core countdown timer engine with background execution
Description: Timer engine that survives backgrounding, corrects for clock drift, and resumes accurately on foreground. Drift < 1s over 30 min.

Summary: Implement session types and preset management
Description: Focus (25m), Short Break (5m), Long Break (15m after 4 focuses). Configurable durations with validated input. Persist TimerPreset model (SwiftData).

Summary: Build timer UI with progress ring and controls
Description: Main timer screen: remaining time, session type indicator, progress ring, pause/resume/cancel buttons, task name display.

Summary: Implement two-tap quick-start flow
Description: Default focus session reachable in <= 2 taps from app launch. Optional task name input on the start path.

Summary: Implement timer completion notifications
Description: Local notification via UNUserNotificationCenter when timer completes in background. Permission request on first use.

Summary: Define UserProfile model and implement onboarding flow
Description: UserProfile (SwiftData): display name, preferences, onboarding state. First-run flow: welcome screen, character selection gate, notification permission prompt, first session nudge.

Summary: Implement session logging and outcome tracking
Description: Persist SessionLog (SwiftData) on completion or abandonment: task name, type, start/end time, planned/actual duration, outcome, XP/coins earned.

Summary: Build session history list view
Description: Scrollable list of past sessions with date, task, duration, and outcome. Sorted most-recent-first.

Summary: Implement daily streak tracking
Description: StreakState model (SwiftData). Increment on first session each calendar day. Reset on missed day without freeze. Local timezone.

Summary: Implement milestone unlock system
Description: Trigger rewards at streak days 3, 7, 14, 30, 60. Grant bonus coins and unlock predefined cosmetic items.

Summary: Implement XP and coin economy
Description: Award XP and coins on session completion. Define XP curve, level thresholds, and coin rates by session type.

Summary: Build streak UI and reward reveal animation
Description: Streak counter on home screen. Celebration animation on milestone (skippable, <= 2.5s). Empathetic messaging on streak loss.

Summary: Implement streak freeze policy
Description: Limited freeze days to protect streak. Define acquisition rules (earned vs purchased). Show freeze status in UI.

Summary: Build base character selection and trait customization
Description: Character selection during onboarding. Trait customization (face/expression/appearance). Persist in CharacterLoadout (SwiftData).

Summary: Build layered 2D sprite rendering and animations
Description: Composite rendering: base + traits + equipped items with z-ordering. Animations: idle, celebrate, focus, rest. Sprite-sheet or Lottie.

Summary: Implement equipment slot system
Description: Slots: head, top, bottom/full-body, accessory. Equip/unequip interaction. Slot exclusivity rules.

Summary: Build inventory grid UI
Description: Grid view of all cosmetics with visual states: owned (color), locked (silhouette), new (badge). New-item badge clears on first view.

Summary: Build character dressing room
Description: Full-screen preview where users swap equipped items and traits. Preview before equipping.

Summary: Implement item unlock and coin purchase flows
Description: Unlock items via milestone rewards or coin purchase. Purchase flow: show cost, confirm, deduct, mark owned.

Summary: Define cosmetic rarity tiers and launch catalog
Description: Common, rare, and animated-rare tiers. Curate launch catalog with adequate variety across all slots and rarity levels.

Summary: Implement daily and weekly quest system
Description: QuestProgress model (SwiftData). Generate daily quests at midnight, weekly quests on Monday. Track progress against targets.

Summary: Build quest list UI with progress indicators
Description: Active quests with progress bars. Visual distinction between daily and weekly. Claim button on completion.

Summary: Implement quest completion reward flow
Description: On target met: show completion state, allow reward claim (coins/XP/item), animate claim.

Summary: Build Today and 7-day stats views
Description: Today: sessions, focus minutes, streak, coins/XP earned. 7-day: daily focus minutes bar or line chart.

Summary: Build all-time stats and session history timeline
Description: Lifetime totals (sessions, minutes, longest streak, total XP/coins). Calendar or timeline view; tap a day for details.

Summary: Build milestone progress tracker
Description: View showing upcoming streak milestones, progress toward each, and preview of locked rewards.

Summary: Define AI data models
Description: SwiftData models: AICoachPreference (tone/nudge_frequency/privacy_mode), AIInteractionLog (session_id/feature_type/accepted/dismissed/latency), BehaviorSignal (completion_rate_7d/abandon_rate_7d/avg_focus_minutes/streak_risk_score).

Summary: Build BehaviorSignal computation layer
Description: Compute rolling behavioral signals from SessionLog and StreakState. Update on each session completion. Input to all AI inference.

Summary: Implement intent framing (inference + UI)
Description: generate_focus_intent: given task and behavior, produce concrete intent. Pre-session UI: accept, edit, or dismiss. Log to AIInteractionLog. Must work offline.

Summary: Implement post-session reflection (inference + UI)
Description: generate_post_session_tip: given outcome and behavior, produce one actionable tip. Post-session UI: acknowledge or dismiss. Log interaction. Must work offline.

Summary: Implement streak rescue nudge (logic + notification + UI)
Description: Trigger when streak_risk_score exceeds threshold and no session today. Max one nudge per window. Local notification and/or in-app banner linking to quick-start.

Summary: Add AI preferences UI and guardrails
Description: Settings: tone (encouraging/direct/calm), nudge frequency (low/medium/high), quiet hours. Frequency cap enforcement. All AI features optional and never block timer.

Summary: Implement deterministic fallback and safety filter
Description: Fallback to curated templates when confidence is low or inference fails. Content filter blocks shaming or harmful language. Log filtered events.

Summary: Wire up AI analytics events
Description: Instrument: ai_prompt_shown, ai_suggestion_accepted, ai_suggestion_dismissed, ai_recommendation_followed, ai_nudge_opened.

Summary: Verify all Wave 1 AI features work offline
Description: End-to-end test in airplane mode: framing, reflection, and nudge all produce valid output with zero network.

Summary: AI Coach Wave 1 phased rollout
Description: Internal dogfood (1 wk) -> 10% A/B (2 wk) -> 50% with guardrails -> 100% after KPI pass.

Summary: Adapt all views for iPad layouts
Description: Responsive layouts for timer, character, inventory, and stats on iPad. Utilize available space without stretching mobile layout.

Summary: Support iPad Split View and Slide Over
Description: App functions correctly in multitasking modes. Graceful rendering at minimum supported width.

Summary: Implement CloudKit sync for core models
Description: Configure CloudKit container. Enable SwiftData + CloudKit sync for UserProfile, SessionLog, StreakState, CharacterLoadout, InventoryItem, QuestProgress.

Summary: Implement sync conflict resolution and offline recovery
Description: Merge conflict strategy (last-writer-wins or field-level). Verify offline-created data syncs on reconnect with no loss or duplication.

Summary: Add VoiceOver and Dynamic Type support
Description: Accessibility labels on all interactive elements. All text scales with preferred size. Layouts adapt without truncation.

Summary: Verify WCAG AA contrast and reduce-motion support
Description: Audit color combinations against 4.5:1 / 3:1 thresholds. Replace animations with crossfades when Reduce Motion is enabled.

Summary: Test full VoiceOver flow end-to-end
Description: Complete start -> complete -> reward -> re-engage loop using only VoiceOver. Fix navigation and announcement issues.

Summary: Integrate analytics SDK and instrument core events
Description: Set up Amplitude or Firebase. Instrument: session_started, session_completed, session_abandoned, streak_milestone, item_unlocked, item_purchased, screen_viewed. Required to measure D1/D30 retention and success KPIs.

Summary: Resolve all P0 and P1 defects
Description: Triage and fix every P0/P1 bug. No open P0/P1 at submission.

Summary: Achieve crash-free rate >= 99.5% in beta
Description: Monitor TestFlight beta. Investigate and fix crashes until target is met.

Summary: End-to-end flow verification on iPhone and iPad
Description: Launch -> start -> complete -> reward -> character -> next session. Verify on both form factors.

Summary: Prepare App Store listing and submit
Description: Description, keywords, privacy policy, screenshots for all required sizes, app preview video. Submit for review.

Summary: Define FocusForge+ subscription and implement StoreKit 2 flow
Description: Specify gated features (advanced stats, premium cosmetic tracks). StoreKit 2: purchase, restore, cancellation.

Summary: Implement cosmetic bundle purchases
Description: Non-randomized one-time cosmetic bundles. No loot-box mechanics. No ads during focus sessions.
